pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA/CUTLASS EVT kernels with cached act-grad, expands MLP + Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant, and adds a fast sparse causal n-gram tilt memory.
techniques: Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP with act-grad caching
Sparse causal n-gram tilt as auxiliary memory with on-GPU exponential tilt
Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quantization to fit wider 3.5× MLP
